subject: Water Point
body:
Attached is a slide show of the exterior of the big water point house and a  
few shots of the interior of the main living room/dining room area.  The  
beach scenes in the slide show and maybe what you were thinking of is the common  
beach for all water point residents.  It is not owned by any one water  point 
owner.
 
All bedrooms are under one roof.
 
It's in water point. Fully furnished; nothing needs to be done.   It's just 
too expensive.  Square footage is 5500 under roof in main home  (does not 
include over garage apartment for live in help).  1200 square  feet of patio.  
Waterfront property.  Ownership of a buoy to which the  owner attaches an included 
trampoline.  Includes Gym space, office space  and media room.  Like I said, 
extravagant.  
 
For kicks, two weeks ago, I asked the broker to see if the owner  would take 
5 MM.  Owner .would not and would not make a counter claiming  that we were 
simply too far apart.  According to the broker, the owner  would not rent the 
place out either.
 
I'll find out from broker what the house cost the owner, if the broker can  
get that info.



************************************** See what's new at http://www.aol.com
body_html:
Attached is a slide show of the exterior of the big water point house and a few shots of the interior of the main living room/dining room area.  The beach scenes in the slide show and maybe what you were thinking of is the common beach for all water point residents.  It is not owned by any one water point owner.
 
All bedrooms are under one roof.
 
It's in water point. Fully furnished; nothing needs to be done.  It's just too expensive.  Square footage is 5500 under roof in main home (does not include over garage apartment for live in help).  1200 square feet of patio.  Waterfront property.  Ownership of a buoy to which the owner attaches an included trampoline.  Includes Gym space, office space and media room.  Like I said, extravagant. 
 
For kicks, two weeks ago, I asked the broker to see if the owner would take 5 MM.  Owner .would not and would not make a counter claiming that we were simply too far apart.  According to the broker, the owner would not rent the place out either.
 
I'll find out from broker what the house cost the owner, if the broker can get that info.



See what's new at AOL.com and Make AOL Your Homepage.
